notes: Use this manifest to decide which packaged files Cadet may update during bootstrap sync.
If managed framework files are updated, require a fresh /cadet chat before continuing.
Treat the packaged zip as a universal bootstrap package rather than the long-term source of truth.
As of v0.5.0, the agent instruction set is condensed into cadet-agent.md. Full rationale, guidance, standards, and templates are in the docs/ directory (GitHub Pages).
